Home of the Renovate CLI: Cross-platform Dependency Automation by Mend.io
CoreDNS is a DNS server that chains plugins

A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.
🐫 CAMEL: The first and the best multi-agent framework. Finding the Scaling Law of Agents. https://www.camel-ai.org
A modular Ruby web server interface.
Packer configuration for building a custom EKS AMI
WHATWG-compliant and fast URL parser written in modern C++, part of Internet Archive, Node.js, Clickhouse, Redpanda, Kong, Telegram, Adguard, Datadog and Cloudflare Workers.
CLI tool for running Yeoman generators
syzkaller is an unsupervised coverage-guided kernel fuzzer
🤖 Dependabot's core logic for creating update PRs.
External DNS webhook provider for Adguard
Azure AD Workload Identity uses Kubernetes primitives to associate managed identities for Azure resources and identities in Azure Active Directory (AAD) with pods.
Connect to any device with no external listening ports open
A developer toolkit to implement Serverless best practices and increase developer velocity.
Cluster Toolkit is an open-source software offered by Google Cloud which makes it easy for customers to deploy AI/ML and HPC environments on Google Cloud.
Whitelabel wallet framework for the Tezos blockchain
A highly customizable Changelog Generator that follows Conventional Commit specifications ⛰️
Zerocopy makes zero-cost memory manipulation effortless. We write `unsafe` so you don’t have to.
Official repository for core projects comprising the Celo platform
Apache Camel is an open source integration framework that empowers you to quickly and easily integrate various systems consuming or producing data.

This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for JavaScript (NodeJS & Browser). For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://docs.microsoft.com/javascript/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-js.
Powertools for AWS is a developer toolkit to implement Serverless best practices and increase developer velocity.
BDD styled unit test framework for Kubernetes Helm charts as a Helm plugin.
DOMPurify - a DOM-only, super-fast, uber-tolerant XSS sanitizer for HTML, MathML and SVG. DOMPurify works with a secure default, but offers a lot of configurability and hooks. Demo:
Visual Studio Code extension for Prettier
MinIO is a high-performance, S3 compatible object store, open sourced under GNU AGPLv3 license.
The fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
BCrypt.Net - Bringing updates to the original bcrypt package
The official home of the Presto distributed SQL query engine for big data

This repository contains Dockerfiles, scripts, yaml files, Helm charts, etc. used to scale out AI containers with versions of TensorFlow and PyTorch that have been optimized for Intel platforms. Scaling is done with python, Docker, kubernetes, kubeflow, cnvrg.io, Helm, and other container orchestration frameworks for use in the cloud and on-premise
A Ruby Gem to detect under what license a project is distributed.
A plug-in for Google's Protocol Buffers (protobufs) compiler to lint .proto files for style violations.
Train, Evaluate, Optimize, Deploy Computer Vision Models via OpenVINO™
Kokkos C++ Performance Portability Programming Ecosystem: Math Kernels - Provides BLAS, Sparse BLAS and Graph Kernels
A real-time media transport (DPDK, AF_XDP) stack for both raw and compressed video based on COTS hardware.
Chinese version of CLIP which achieves Chinese cross-modal retrieval and representation generation.

Scalar is an open-source API platform:　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　🌐 Modern REST API Client　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　📖 Beautiful API References　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　✨ 1st-Class OpenAPI/Swagger Support
swagger-codegen contains a template-driven engine to generate documentation, API clients and server stubs in different languages by parsing your OpenAPI / Swagger definition.
External Secrets Operator reads information from a third-party service like AWS Secrets Manager and automatically injects the values as Kubernetes Secrets.
JHipster is a development platform to quickly generate, develop, & deploy modern web applications & microservice architectures.

Polly is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express policies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Timeout, Bulkhead Isolation, and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner. From version 6.0.1, Polly targets .NET Standard 1.1 and 2.0+.
The official AWS SDK for Ruby
A Sigstore client written in Python
Cloud-native search engine for observability. An open-source alternative to Datadog, Elasticsearch, Loki, and Tempo.
Provides sample implementations of the Polly library. The intent of this project is to help newcomers kick-start their use of Polly within their own projects.
Command-line tool for Kysely, Knex-compatible, works in Node.js, Deno, Bun, etc.
Kuscia(Kubernetes-based Secure Collaborative InfrA) is a K8s-based privacy-preserving computing task orchestration framework.
SCQL  (Secure Collaborative Query Language) is a system that allows multiple distrusting parties to run joint analysis without revealing their private data.
SPU (Secure Processing Unit) aims to be a provable, measurable secure computation device, which provides computation ability while keeping your private data protected.
Generation of diagrams like flowcharts or sequence diagrams from text in a similar manner as markdown
Examples and server integrations for generating the Swagger API Specification, which enables easy access to your REST API
Serves a webpack app. Updates the browser on changes. Documentation https://webpack.js.org/configuration/dev-server/.
